top_stories.title: Adobe’s new Firefly AI assistant can use Creative Cloud apps to complete tasks
top_stories.description: Adobe says the assistant can work across apps like Firefly, Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Express, Illustrator and its other apps to do tasks for you.
top_stories.author: Ivan Mehta
top_stories.content: Adobe says the assistant can work across apps like Firefly, Photoshop, Premiere, Lightroom, Express, Illustrator and its other apps to do tasks for you.

top_stories.title: NVIDIA and the University of Maryland Researchers Released Audio Flamingo Next (AF-Next): A Super Powerful and Open Large Audio-Language Model
top_stories.description: Understanding audio has always been the multimodal frontier that lags behind vision. While image-language models have rapidly scaled toward real-world deployment, building open models that robustly reason over speech, environmental sounds, and music — especially at length — has remained quite hard. top_stories.title: Human-in-the-loop constructs for agentic workflows in healthcare and life sciences
top_stories.description: In healthcare and life sciences, AI agents help organizations process clinical data, submit regulatory filings, automate medical coding, and accelerate drug development and commercialization. However, the sensitive nature of healthcare data and regulatory requirements like Good Practice (GxP) compliance require human oversight at key decision points. This is where human-in-the-loop (HITL) constructs become essential. In this post, you will learn four practical approaches to implementing...
top_stories.author: Pierre de Malliard
top_stories.content: In healthcare and life sciences, AI agents help organizations process clinical data, submit regulatory filings, automate medical coding, and accelerate drug development and commercialization. However, the sensitive nature of healthcare data and regulatory requirements like Good Practice (GxP) compliance require human oversight at key decision points. top_stories.title: Microsoft named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™ for Sovereign Cloud Platforms
top_stories.description: Microsoft is named a Leader in The Forrester Wave™ for Sovereign Cloud Platforms, recognizing Microsoft Sovereign Cloud leadership in evolving sovereignty needs.
